revision.comment: create template for draft categories which should only be added in mainspace
Add info about the article not yet being in the categories.
remove leading category colons in mainspace, tweak explanation
allow draft pages to already have leading colon

Protected "[[Template:Draft categories]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
Add tracking category for uses of this template in the main namespace
Remove margin add space, like Vector skin
Should be lowercase

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Draft categories]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3527 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

Created page with "{{main other |1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=:[Cc]ategory|replace=Category|plain=false}}[[Category:Articles using draft categories]] |2=
This page will be placed in the following categories if it is moved to the [[WP:NS0|article namespace]].
[[Help:Category|Categories]]:
    {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=%{{!}}(.-)%]|replace=]|p..."
9 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Draft_categories]]: Importing from English Wikipedia for the purposes of this wiki
Removing from [[Category:Original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{main other |1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=:[Cc]ategory|replace=Category|plain=false}}[[Category:Articles using draft categories]] [[Category:original pages]] |2=
This page will be placed in the following categories if it is moved to the [[WP:NS0|article namespace]].
[[Help:Category|Categories]]:
    {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=%{{!}}(.-)%]|replace=]|plain=false}}|pattern=%[%[:?[Cc]ategory:(.-)%]%]|replace=
  • [[:Category:%1|%1]]
    • |plain=false}}
}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates
revision.text:
{{main other |1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=:[Cc]ategory|replace=Category|plain=false}}[[Category:Articles using draft categories]] [[Category:original pages]] |2=
This page will be placed in the following categories if it is moved to the [[WP:NS0|article namespace]].
[[Help:Category|Categories]]:
    {{#invoke:String|replace|source={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|}}}|pattern=%{{!}}(.-)%]|replace=]|plain=false}}|pattern=%[%[:?[Cc]ategory:(.-)%]%]|replace=
  • [[:Category:%1|%1]]
    • |plain=false}}
}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:simple>PotsdamLamb|simple>PotsdamLamb]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Undo revision [[Special:Diff/2105527|2105527]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])
Undo revision [[Special:Diff/2233711|2233711]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:simple>PotsdamLamb|simple>PotsdamLamb]]

Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Draft categories]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: importing categories I made
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Undo revision [[Special:Diff/3213623|3213623]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{{1|}}} <noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Articles using draft categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{{1|}}} <noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Articles using draft categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_categories here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Draft_categories for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{{1|}}} <noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Articles using draft categories]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
